docs.text: Research Log This site is a structured research log. Start from Research Themes or read the Architecture .
docs.title: Home

docs.text: This site is a structured research log. Start from Research Themes or read the Architecture .
docs.title: Research Log

docs.text: Architecture Organization The site is organized by research theme first. docs/ themes/ analyst/ ideas/ papers/ sellside_reports/ factor_notes/ experiments/ Each research theme can reuse the same internal structure: ideas/ : raw hypotheses and research directions. papers/ : academic paper notes. sellside_reports/ : sell-side report notes. factor_notes/ : cleaned factor definitions and implementation-ready notes. experiments/ : experiment logs, backtest summaries, and reproducibility notes. Conventions Use stable English directory names and readable Markdown titles. Keep daily notes under daily/ . Use them for chronological capture, then promote durable material into the relevant research theme. Keep cross-theme material under references/ .
docs.title: Architecture
